name: G-3 rule ID namespacing: community plugin rules in _community/<plugin-id>/ must use <plugin-id>/<rule-id> form
command:
mkdir -p tree/_community/my-plugin && printf 'source:
  id: c
rules:
  - id: g-foo-001
' > tree/_community/my-plugin/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing 2>err.txt; grep -q 'must use my-plugin/<rule-id> namespaced form' err.txt && echo community_namespaced 1>&2
